name: Nalus Thundertide
sd_appearance: Dragonborn standing over 6 feet, obsidian-shimmering scales, tall scholar robes of pale blue, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles perched on nose, ink-stained hands holding a book of forbidden knowledge, reinforced elbows visible, multiple scroll cases attached to robes, one distinctive visual detail: a silver-inlaid dragon skull pendant hanging from a leather thong around his neck.
faction_visual: pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles, ink-stained hands
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
